{ "name": "hermes-parser", "version": "0.25.1", "description": "A JavaScript parser built from the Hermes engine", "main": "dist/index.js", "license": "MIT", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git@github.com:facebook/hermes.git" }, "dependencies": { "hermes-estree": "0.25.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@babel/parser": "7.7.4", "@babel/generator": "7.7.4", "@babel/types": "7.7.4", "espree": "9.3.2" }, "files": [ "dist", "LICENCE", "README.md" ] }
